source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open Kwik-E-Mart, the grocery delivery app at http://localhost:3009 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Create a new shopping list named "Memorial Day BBQ Run" and add these three items to it: Hamburger Buns 8ct (quantity 3), Ground Beef 80/20 (2 lb) (quantity 2), and Dill Pickle Spears (quantity 1).
